title: Stock Market Today: QuantumScape Jumps After Q1 Results as Management Eyes New Markets
text: QuantumScape stock surged 14% in after-hours trading following better-than-expected Q1 2026 earnings, driven by two key factors: an EPS beat and expansion into new market segments. Management reported Q1 2026 EPS of -$0.16 versus consensus estimates of -$0.18, a modest beat that nonetheless drove significant investor enthusiasm. Beyond the earnings beat, the real driver of investor optimism was management's discussion of new addressable markets beyond automotive. The company highlighted strong customer interest in AI data centers, defense applications, aerospace, and robotics sectors. CEO Siva Sivaram emphasized that solid-state batteries are uniquely suited for AI data centers where you absolutely cannot have a fire with million-dollar GPUs. This market expansion represents a significant broadening of the company's addressable market and potential commercialization pathways. The stock reaction suggests investors are rewarding this strategic pivot and the potential for multiple revenue streams beyond automotive OEMs.
